metadata.description: clawtool: the canonical tool layer for AI coding agents — by Bahadır Arda

plugins.name: clawtool
plugins.description: The canonical tool layer for AI coding agents. Auto-registers an MCP server on install (no claude mcp add-json), biases agent preference toward clawtool's structured-output / timeout-safe / format-aware tools via the loaded skill description, exposes /clawtool slash commands. Uninstall removes everything except user data and the binary itself.
